name: macOS Say TTS
description: Expose OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/speech and /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoints through OpenClaw.

defaultVoice.label: Default Voice
defaultVoice.help: macOS say voice name, for example Tingting.

defaultRate.label: Default Rate
defaultRate.help: Speech rate in words per minute when the request omits speed.

sampleRate.label: WAV Sample Rate
sampleRate.help: Output sample rate passed to afconvert when response_format is wav.

maxInputChars.label: Max Input Chars
maxInputChars.help: Reject requests whose input text exceeds this length.

maxAudioBytes.label: Max Audio Bytes
maxAudioBytes.help: Reject transcription uploads whose multipart body exceeds this size.

transcriptionBackend.label: Transcription Backend
transcriptionBackend.help: Use local whisper by default, OpenClaw runtime for one-shot transcription, or doubao-realtime for the new streaming ASR bridge.

transcriptionCommand.label: Transcription Command
transcriptionCommand.help: CLI command used for local transcription, for example whisper.

transcriptionModel.label: Transcription Model
transcriptionModel.help: Model name passed to the local whisper CLI.

transcriptionLanguage.label: Transcription Language
transcriptionLanguage.help: Optional fixed language code for local whisper, for example zh or en.

transcriptionTimeoutSeconds.label: Transcription Timeout
transcriptionTimeoutSeconds.help: Timeout in seconds for local transcription runs.

doubaoAppId.label: Doubao App ID
doubaoAppId.help: Required for doubao-realtime. ByteDance/Volcengine application ID used for realtime ASR sessions.

doubaoAccessToken.label: Doubao Access Token
doubaoAccessToken.help: Required for doubao-realtime. Token used to authenticate upstream realtime ASR sessions.

doubaoWsUrl.label: Doubao WS URL
doubaoWsUrl.help: Required for doubao-realtime. WebSocket URL for the upstream realtime ASR endpoint.

doubaoResourceId.label: Doubao Resource ID
doubaoResourceId.help: Backward-compatible alias for the upstream realtime ASR cluster identifier.

doubaoCluster.label: Doubao Cluster
doubaoCluster.help: Required for doubao-realtime. Upstream ASR cluster identifier used in the realtime request payload.

doubaoLanguage.label: Doubao Language
doubaoLanguage.help: Optional default language code for realtime ASR, for example zh.

doubaoChunkMs.label: Doubao Chunk Size
doubaoChunkMs.help: Chunk duration in milliseconds sent upstream for realtime ASR. 100 ms is the recommended starting point.

doubaoEnableVad.label: Doubao VAD
doubaoEnableVad.help: Enable upstream voice activity detection for realtime ASR.

doubaoVadStartSilenceMs.label: Doubao VAD Start Silence
doubaoVadStartSilenceMs.help: How much leading silence to tolerate before speech start is considered missing.

doubaoVadEndSilenceMs.label: Doubao VAD End Silence
doubaoVadEndSilenceMs.help: How much trailing silence to wait before upstream speech end is considered complete.

realtimeSessionTimeoutSeconds.label: Realtime Session Timeout
realtimeSessionTimeoutSeconds.help: Maximum lifetime for a realtime STT session before forced cleanup.

realtimeIdleTimeoutSeconds.label: Realtime Idle Timeout
realtimeIdleTimeoutSeconds.help: How long an inactive realtime STT session may stay idle before cleanup.

realtimeMaxAudioSeconds.label: Realtime Max Audio
realtimeMaxAudioSeconds.help: Maximum audio duration accepted for one realtime session.

commandMediaBaseUrl.label: Command Media Base URL
commandMediaBaseUrl.help: Base URL used to build temporary media links for /tts command replies.

mediaTtlSeconds.label: Media TTL Seconds
mediaTtlSeconds.help: How long temporary command-generated audio files remain downloadable.
